rooms.name: The Stone Chamber
rooms.description: A small stone room with cold walls. A heavy iron door blocks the only exit. There's a small table near the wall.

rooms.name: Freedom
rooms.description: You've escaped! Bright sunlight streams through the open archway.

items.name: rusty key
items.description: An old rusty key, slightly bent but still functional. It looks like it might fit the door lock.

puzzles.name: locked door
puzzles.description: The heavy iron door is locked shut. You need a key to open it.
